findings.detail: Zero imports from pipeline/ siblings. Zero imports from shadows/. Only standard library: __future__, dataclasses. Pure function with no external dependencies.

compute_position_size() is a pure function: all inputs are scalar parameters, output is PositionSizeResult dataclass. No side effects, no state mutation. Can be called from gate3, backtest, or any other module without coupling.
Single public function: compute_position_size(). Single public type: PositionSizeResult. Clean contract.

Called by gate3_interaction.py:267 with properly bounded inputs (win_probability from hypothesis confidence, user_conviction_discount ratio-clamped to [0,1], volatility_percentile=0.5 default, correlation=0.0 default). All callers pass validated values.
